text:
Question: A library is closed on Sundays. Today is Sunday. What can be concluded?
A. The library is open
B. The library is closed
C. The library moved
D. The library sells tickets
label: B

text:
Question: Mia has three apples and buys two more. How many apples does she have?
A. 3
B. 4
C. 5
D. 6
label: C

text:
Question: If all robins are birds and birds have feathers, what do robins have?
A. Fur
B. Feathers
C. Scales
D. Wheels
label: B

text:
Question: The train leaves at 9:00 and the trip takes one hour. When does it arrive?
A. 8:00
B. 9:30
C. 10:00
D. 11:00
label: C

text:
Question: Which option is the synonym of quick?
A. Fast
B. Heavy
C. Quiet
D. Empty
label: A

text:
Question: Which option is not an animal?
A. Cat
B. Dog
C. Horse
D. Table
label: D

text:
Question: Which sentence describes cause and effect?
A. It rained, so the ground became wet
B. The sky is blue
C. A cat sat quietly
D. The book is on a shelf
label: A

text:
Question: Which number is greater than 8?
A. 2
B. 6
C. 8
D. 10
label: D
